properties.description: "Pay What You Want" Walking Tours Everyday of the week at 10am and 3pm in Valparaíso, Chile. We meet at Plaza Sotomayor every day of the week. Our guides wear red and white striped t-shirts like the children's book 'Where is Wally' or 'Where's Waldo' on some countries, so it is easy to find us. The tour is a 2,5 hour highlights walk through the city.
properties.name: Tours 4 Tips

properties.description: Free walking tours of Valparaiso. Every day from Monday to Sunday at 10 am and 3 pm. Meeting point: Plaza Anibal Pinto (look for guides wearing red T-shirts)
properties.name: Free Tour Valparaiso

properties.description: We are Chile & Cuisine Cooking Classes, a Local Kitchen and Cocinería in Valparaiso, who teach travelers about our local Traditions, Culture and Heritage, in the form of very fun, and very hands-on cooking classes. We are available every day of the year with our morning class 10 :00 and our evening classes at 17:00. We are also a Pop-up Chilean Tapas & Wine Restaurant. Our Website provides full descriptions of the classes.
properties.address: Paseo Barbosa 151 Cerro Mariposa, Valparaiso 2340000 Chile
properties.name: Chilean Cuisine Cooking Classes

properties.name: Patatour Chile

properties.description: CUSTOMIZED TOURS & PACKAGES IN CHILE : Atacama desert, Patagonia, Valparaiso, Wine country, Santiago, Easter Island & more... "Travelling with Chile Private Tours is like visiting with friends" This is what past travelers have told us, and we do our best to keep it that way. Hi, I'm Thomas Poussard, a French journalist and writer turned private guide in Chile, where I live since 2006. Along with my colleague Valentin, we create custom-made tours and itineraries throughout the entire country, from Patagonia to the Atacama desert, from Santiago to Easter Island, to the wine country, Valparaiso, the Lake District, the volcanoes and glaciers, etc. Our goal: to take into account all your requirements in order to create together the best possible program. Awarded the TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence & Traveler's Choice for 6 straight years since 2015, we love to take our travelers off the beaten tracks, to show you our favorite places in each area of this beautiful country.
properties.rankingString: #1 of 22 Tours in Vina del Mar
properties.name: Chile Private Tours

properties.description: Embark on a kaleidoscope of Valparaiso with us! Meander through vibrant streets adorned with murals, climb hidden stairs whispering of history, and stumble upon plazas where music dances with bohemia. Unleash your inner explorer; unearth Valparaiso's soul through bites of fresh ceviche, savory empanadas, and aromatic chorrillana. Craft your adventure on our website and join us soon! See you where creativity paints the streets!
properties.name: Ecomapu Travel

properties.description: Tailor-made private tours in Valparaiso and its surrounds off the beaten path and at your own pace.

properties.name: Industrial Revolution Eatery & Grille
properties.description: Born out of a passion to create a bold, unique and exciting restaurant theme, the Industrial Revolution Eatery & Grille fuses the finest handcrafted comfort cuisine with an atmosphere that pays tribute to the American spirit of Innovation and Greatness.We aim to connect with our guests by telling the story of our nation’s inspirational past while serving them delicious classic foods favored by the American worker. This unique environment, which we call Upscale Industrial, is meant to inspire diners with inspirational stories of both famous and ordinary people who have made great contributions building our country as well as the risks taken that best exemplify Greatness.

properties.name: Il Paparazzo
properties.description: Inspired by the movie "La Dolce Vita" by Fellini and set in an exquisite 50's style with contemporary air, this restaurant is located a few meters from Concepción Elevator, Paseo Gervasoni and Casa Mirador de Lukas. Its specialty is Italian, Sea and Vegan Cuisine, where the fusion of flavors is the protagonist of its menu ... Stuffed pasta, variety of fish and shellfish (rock fish, Easter Island tuna, Salmon from Southern Chile, Octopus from the North ...), meats, salads and delicious desserts. It also has a wide variety of wines by the glass, various strains to taste and cocktails, ideal to accompany them with the best of their cuisine
